title: RedstoneWhisper
description: Provide a quieter and more pleasant  Redstone block sound
body:
This pack focuses on transforming the clunky, harsh noises of Minecraft's machinery into a **smoother, more pleasant auditory experience**. Suitable for players who spend a lot of time around automated farms and redstone contraptions.

### **Partial Modification:**

* **Pistons & Sticky Pistons:** Replaced the dry clack with a deep, dampened hydraulic movement.

* **Dispensers & Droppers & Crafters:** Softer and quieter sounds.

* **Minecarts:** Immersive rolling and riding ambiance that removes high-frequency friction noise.

* **Iron Doors & Trapdoors:** Eliminate sharp friction noise.
